creator: benlutz@datacomm.ch
text:
On Sunday 01 June 2008 22:20:10 Edwin Groothuis wrote:
> Maintainer of ports-mgmt/psearch,
>
> Please note that PR ports/124192 has just been submitted.
>
> If it contains a patch for an upgrade, an enhancement or a bug fix
> you agree on, reply to this email stating that you approve the patch
> and a committer will take care of it.
>
> The full text of the PR can be found at:
>     http://www.freebsd.org/cgi/query-pr.cgi?pr=ports/124192


Yes, I agree, and it really is the same person behind the two email 
addresses :)

Thanks for handling this PR!

Cheers
Benjamin
